title: October 26
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|October}}
'''October 26''' is the 299th day of the year (300th in leap years), with 66 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1949|1949]] – [[Glynis Oliver]] is born.
*[[1950s#1953|1953]] – [[Jennifer Roberson]] is born.
*[[1960s#1960|1960]] – [[June Brigman]] is born.
*[[1983]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 19|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 19]] published
*[[1985]] – "[[The Land of the Gupins]]" of [[Ewoks (television series)|''Ewoks'']] airx on [[ABC Television Network|ABC]].
*1985 – "[[The Revenge of Kybo Ren]]" of [[Star Wars: Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO|''Star Wars Droids'']] airx on ABC.
*1985 – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 123|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 123]] published.
*[[2004]] – ''[[Jedi Trial]]'' published.
*2004 – ''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'' published.
*2004 – ''[[The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]'' published.
*[[2005]] – [[X-Wing: Rogue Leader 2|''X-Wing: Rogue Leader'' 2]] published.
*[[2010]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II]]'' released.
*2010 – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars The Complete Season Two|''The Clone Wars: The Complete Season Two'']] released on [[Star Wars home video releases|DVD]] and Blu-Ray.
*2010 – [[Star Wars Insider 121|''Star Wars Insider'' 121]] published.
*[[2011]] – [[Crimson Empire III: Empire Lost 1|''Crimson Empire III: Empire Lost'' 1]] published.
*[[2014]] – ''[[Star Wars Rebels: Spark of Rebellion]]'' airs on the [[Wikipedia:American Broadcasting Company|ABC]] network with an exclusive prologue scene featuring [[Anakin Skywalker|Darth Vader]] and [[the Grand Inquisitor]].
*[[2016]] – [[Poe Dameron 7|''Poe Dameron'' 7]] published.
*2016 – [[Star Wars (2015) 24|''Star Wars'' (2015) 24]] published.
*[[2021]] – ''[[Star Wars: Galaxy's Edge: The Official Black Spire Outpost Cookbook]]'' Gift Set Edition published.
*2021 – ''[[Victory's Price: An Alphabet Squadron Novel]]'' published in paperback.
*2021 – ''[[Star Wars Paper Models]]'' published.
*2021 – "[[Star Wars Inside Intel: The Nihil Hierarchy|''Star Wars'' Inside Intel: The Nihil Hierarchy]]" published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2022]] – [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi (television series)|''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi'']] premiered all episodes on [[Disney+]].
*2022 – "[[Narkina 5 (episode)|Narkina 5]]" of ''[[Star Wars: Andor]]'' released.
*2022 – [[Doctor Aphra (2020) 25|''Doctor Aphra'' (2020) 25]] published.
<noinclude>
